description: A romantic seascape showing a moonlit night on the Crimean coast. The full moon hangs low in a luminous sky, casting a brilliant golden path of light across the calm sea. Dark silhouettes of mountains, cypress trees, buildings with a minaret, and figures line the shore. Sailing ships are anchored in the harbor. The color palette transitions from deep blue-black at the top to warm golden light at the horizon. Small figures sit on the shoreline.
